Patch Set 1:

Can't you just click "rebase" here in gerrit? You're obviously doing smth wrong. You don't want some other patch rebase on top of this but other way round - rebase this on the elalto. I can't click rebase for you as I don't have commiters permissions here.

Patch Set 1:

Issue those commands in your clone:

git checkout elalto
git pull --ff-only
<fetch this changeset>
git rebase elalto
<resolve merge conflicts in heatbridge/heatbridge/HeatBridge.py>
git add heatbridge/heatbridge/HeatBridge.py
git rebase --continue
git push origin HEAD:refs/for/elalto

You got 403 because you're using bad remote - git.onap.org is read only. You should be using gerrit.onap.org with either https or ssh based auth.
Uploaded patch set 2.
